description: Spacious, trendy and useful - these three elements combine perfectly to create this backpack from fila. Made of superior polyester and unmatched standard of stitching, this bag is sure to last you long and take you places.MeasurementHeight: 42&rdquo Width:  30&rdquo Depth:  18&rdquo Made of 100% polyester for enhanced durability and waterproofingRoomy inner compartment with a smaller compartment on the frontNylon bonded thread for long lifeMesh lining on the backHaul loop for handling easePadded, adjustable shoulder straps that distribute weight evenly and protect the shoulders and back from injuriesErgonomic design to Fit the torso comfortablyCareDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
